raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should 'Check this' be interpreted as a general research-writing check, a language-polish check only, or a technical validity check of the paper's claims?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A generic request to check a research passage centrally includes whether the argument from method to results to conclusion is coherent.","R1.3":"The passage makes quantitative and ablation-based claims, so checking whether reported evidence supports those claims is centrally implicated.","R1.6":"The short delegation commonly includes checking grammar, flow, register, and concision at the sentence and paragraph level.","RX.1":"Any projection of this broad request must preserve uncertainty about the intended kind of checking.","RX.2":"The artifact contains production-facing medical AI claims, making overclaim avoidance an active responsibility.","RX.3":"The agent must only project the delegation and avoid actually checking, editing, or critiquing the artifact.","RX.4":"Because the artifact concerns radiology drafting, downstream-harm avoidance remains active even in projection.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation text and the specific claims present in the artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should 'Check this' be interpreted as a general research-writing check, a language-polish check only, or a technical validity check of the paper's claims?

rationale.R1.2: A generic request to check a research passage centrally includes whether the argument from method to results to conclusion is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The passage makes quantitative and ablation-based claims, so checking whether reported evidence supports those claims is centrally implicated.
rationale.R1.6: The short delegation commonly includes checking grammar, flow, register, and concision at the sentence and paragraph level.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of this broad request must preserve uncertainty about the intended kind of checking.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains production-facing medical AI claims, making overclaim avoidance an active responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must only project the delegation and avoid actually checking, editing, or critiquing the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact concerns radiology drafting, downstream-harm avoidance remains active even in projection.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation text and the specific claims present in the artifact.
